questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "passage"?
questions.explanation: "passage" có nghĩa là "đoạn văn".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "comprehension"?
questions.explanation: "comprehension" có nghĩa là "đọc hiểu".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "main idea"?
questions.explanation: "main idea" có nghĩa là "ý chính".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "detail"?
questions.explanation: "detail" có nghĩa là "chi tiết".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "infer"?
questions.explanation: "infer" có nghĩa là "suy luận".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "context"?
questions.explanation: "context" có nghĩa là "ngữ cảnh".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "summary"?
questions.explanation: "summary" có nghĩa là "tóm tắt".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "topic"?
questions.explanation: "topic" có nghĩa là "chủ đề".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "paragraph"?
questions.explanation: "paragraph" có nghĩa là "đoạn văn".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "skim"?
questions.explanation: "skim" có nghĩa là "đọc lướt".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "scan"?
questions.explanation: "scan" có nghĩa là "đọc dò".

questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "vocabulary"?
questions.explanation: "vocabulary" có nghĩa là "từ vựng".

questions.question: Choose the best word: Use _____ to guess meaning.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Use context to guess meaning." — từ đúng là "context" (ngữ cảnh).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Write a short _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Write a short summary." — từ đúng là "summary" (tóm tắt).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The _____ is travel.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The topic is travel." — từ đúng là "topic" (chủ đề).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The first _____ is short.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The first paragraph is short." — từ đúng là "paragraph" (đoạn văn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: _____ the text for the gist.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Skim the text for the gist." — từ đúng là "skim" (đọc lướt).

questions.question: Choose the best word: _____ for specific numbers.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Scan for specific numbers." — từ đúng là "scan" (đọc dò).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Build your _____ daily.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Build your vocabulary daily." — từ đúng là "vocabulary" (từ vựng).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Find a _____ for 'big'.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Find a synonym for 'big'." — từ đúng là "synonym" (từ đồng nghĩa).

questions.question: Choose the best word: 'Hot' is an _____ of 'cold'.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "'Hot' is an antonym of 'cold'." — từ đúng là "antonym" (từ trái nghĩa).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The article is about _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The article is about travel." — từ đúng là "travel" (du lịch).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Exercise is good for _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Exercise is good for health." — từ đúng là "health" (sức khỏe).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Technology changes _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Technology changes society." — từ đúng là "society" (xã hội).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The main ___ of a text is its central message.
questions.explanation: The main idea is the central message.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: To read quickly for the gist, you ___.
questions.explanation: Skimming means reading quickly for general meaning.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: To find a specific number, you ___ the text.
questions.explanation: Scanning means looking for specific information.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: A word with a similar meaning is a ___.
questions.explanation: A synonym has a similar meaning.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: A word with the opposite meaning is an ___.
questions.explanation: An antonym has the opposite meaning.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Use the ___ to guess an unknown word.
questions.explanation: Context helps guess meaning.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: A short retelling of a text is a ___.
questions.explanation: A summary briefly restates the text.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The writer of a text is the ___.
questions.explanation: The author writes the text.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Something true that can be proven is a ___.
questions.explanation: A fact can be proven true.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: A personal belief is an ___.
questions.explanation: An opinion is a personal view.

questions.question: Which English word means "đoạn văn"?
questions.explanation: "đoạn văn" trong tiếng Anh là "passage".

questions.question: Which English word means "đọc hiểu"?
questions.explanation: "đọc hiểu" trong tiếng Anh là "comprehension".

questions.question: Which English word means "ý chính"?
questions.explanation: "ý chính" trong tiếng Anh là "main idea".

questions.question: Which English word means "chi tiết"?
questions.explanation: "chi tiết" trong tiếng Anh là "detail".

questions.question: Which English word means "suy luận"?
questions.explanation: "suy luận" trong tiếng Anh là "infer".

questions.question: Which English word means "ngữ cảnh"?
questions.explanation: "ngữ cảnh" trong tiếng Anh là "context".
